description: An underground supervisor performs a weekly inspection of a refuge station to ensure it is ready for use in an emergency.

nodes.task_description: Open the 'Refuge Station Inspection' checklist on a mobile device.

expected_outcome.value: The correct digital checklist is loaded.

nodes.task_description: Inspect the station, checking the supply of compressed air, water, and first aid supplies.
Notice that the pressure on an oxygen cylinder is low. Create a work order to have the cylinder replaced immediately.

expected_outcome.value: A high-priority work order is created to ensure the station is fully stocked and ready for an emergency.
